overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a cowboy character walking through a frontier town, transitioning from dirt streets lined with brick buildings to a wooden pier extending over a lake. The character passes various NPCs and ends with a view of the water and distant mountains.

scene_state.functional_zone: frontier town dirt street with brick commercial buildings

events.description: character finishes wiping face animation and begins walking forward along the dirt road
passing close to a pedestrian in white dress and bonnet walking in opposite direction

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the dirt road beside a large brick building, passing occasional pedestrians and glancing around

notable_agents.action: woman in white dress and bonnet walking toward the camera on the left side of the path
man on horseback riding across the intersection in the distance

entered.detail: three-story brick commercial building with arched windows and decorative cornice
unpaved dirt road with visible wagon wheel ruts running through the center
tall wooden telegraph or electrical poles lining the street
unfinished wooden building frame with support beams

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a dusty frontier town street, passing a large red brick building on the right and wooden scaffolding on the left. The road is unpaved with visible wagon tracks, and a few pedestrians in period clothing walk in the opposite direction under a bright midday sun.

scene_state.functional_zone: transition zone between town and waterfront with wooden construction

events.description: character briefly raises hand to tip hat while continuing to walk forward
approaching wooden steps leading up to the waterfront pier structure

agents.ego_description: walking past wooden construction structures while approaching the waterfront, briefly tipping hat to a passing pedestrian

notable_agents.action: man in overalls and cap walking toward the camera on the left side
man in red shirt walking away from camera on the right side

entered.detail: ornate wooden pavilion with decorative trim and stairs leading up to the pier
calm lake or river visible in the distance beyond the pavilion
painted wooden fence marking the edge of the waterfront area

segments.scene_description: The character moves from the enclosed street into a more open area approaching the waterfront. A decorative wooden pavilion becomes visible ahead, with the glint of water beyond it. The character passes workmen and other townspeople while walking past wooden construction frameworks.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden boardwalk pier extending over water with cargo and seating

events.description: ascending wooden steps onto the pier deck, transitioning from dirt to wooden planks
slowing pace and looking around while approaching the end of the pier

agents.ego_description: walking along the wooden pier, passing seated and standing NPCs, eventually slowing to observe the water and distant shoreline views

notable_agents.action: man in vest and hat descending the steps from the pavilion
elderly man in red coat seated on a bench reading a newspaper

entered.detail: weathered wooden plank walkway with herringbone pattern near the edges
white painted wooden railings lining both sides of the pier
ornate black cast iron lamp posts with multiple lanterns
stacks of wooden barrels and shipping crates along the pier sides
simple wooden slatted benches for seating along the pier

segments.scene_description: The character ascends onto a wooden pier extending over calm water, walking past cargo barrels, benches, and other pedestrians. The pier features white railings and vintage lamp posts, with views of distant mountains and the town shoreline. The character slows to take in the waterfront scenery at the pier's end.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dusty frontier town that gradually opens up into a serene waterfront vista. It begins on an unpaved street lined with a large red brick building and wooden scaffolding, moving past pedestrians under a bright midday sun. As the character advances, the enclosed street gives way to a more open area where wooden construction frameworks and a decorative pavilion lead the way toward the glint of water. The scene then shifts as the camera ascends onto a wooden pier, passing cargo barrels and vintage lamp posts while the terrain transitions from dirt to weathered planks. Finally, the movement slows at the pier's end, revealing a wide view of the calm water and distant mountains beyond the town shoreline.
